description: This script contains static fields, properties or static methods that register to static events, but does not contain a method with the [RuntimeInitializeOnLoadMethod] attribute. If Domain Reload is disabled to facilitate faster entering/exiting Play Mode, the values in the static fields and properties will not be reset, and the static methods would remain registered to the event(s).
recommendation: Create a method with a [RuntimeInitializeOnLoadMethod] attribute and ensure that all static variables and properties are assigned values in this method, and static methods are registered in this method.

description: This script contains one or more static fields or properties and a method with the [RuntimeInitializeOnLoadMethod] attribute, but the method does not set the value of the fields or properties. If Domain Reload is disabled to facilitate faster entering/exiting Play Mode, the values in the static fields or properties will not be reset.
recommendation: Ensure that the method with a [RuntimeInitializeOnLoadMethod] attribute assigns values to all static variables and properties declared in this class.

description: This script contains a static delegate which is registered to a static event, but the analyzer can't guarantee that the delegate is explicitly unsubscribed when leaving Play Mode. If Domain Reload is disabled to facilitate faster entering/exiting Play Mode, the event may end up with multiple duplicate registered delegates.
recommendation: Unsubscribe callbacks from static events when they are no longer needed. For static delegates, the safest place to unsubscribe is a method with a [RuntimeInitializeOnLoadMethod] attribute.

description: This script contains a non-static delegate which is registered to a static event, but the analyzer can't guarantee that the delegate is explicitly unsubscribed when leaving Play Mode. If Domain Reload is disabled to facilitate faster entering/exiting Play Mode, the event may end up with multiple duplicate registered delegates.
recommendation: Unsubscribe callbacks from static events when they are no longer needed. For non-static delegates, the safest place to unsubscribe is in a MonoBehaviour.OnDisable() or MonoBehaviour.OnDestroy() method.

description: This script contains a non-static delegate which is registered to a static event, but no corresponding MonoBehaviour.OnDisable() or MonoBehaviour.OnDestroy() method in which to unsubscribe when leaving Play Mode. If Domain Reload is disabled to facilitate faster entering/exiting Play Mode, the event may end up with multiple duplicate registered delegates.
recommendation: Unsubscribe callbacks from static events when they are no longer needed. For non-static delegates, the safest place to unsubscribe is in a MonoBehaviour.OnDisable() or MonoBehaviour.OnDestroy() method.
